title: Bootleg Medicom figures
wikitext:
[]: Bootleg Medicom figures?             Quote Post by erik352 » Sat Nov 14, 2015 8:19 am Hi guys! I just bought a Medicom RAH Asuka Plugsuit 2.0 figure off amazon from a seller in Japan. I notice the box uses regular tape, not the circle tape. Also the flap uses velcro instead of magnets. Do you think this is a bootleg? Also, the hologram sticker is GAINAX, all the other RAH I got have 2 sticker, one is EVANGELION OFFICIALLY LICENSE, and the other is CLEVER CREATION COMPANY [URL=http://s331.photobucket.com/user/erik352/media/DSCN2967_zpsyymovkun.jpg.html] [/URL] [URL=http://s331.photobucket.com/user/erik352/media/DSCN2968_zpsafmxvi7j.jpg.html] [/URL] I bought several other RAH and they all have the magnet flap and circle tape on the box [URL=http://s331.photobucket.com/user/erik352/media/DSCN2969_zpsvqf2inzy.jpg.html] [/URL] Any help or info would be apprecated. thanks

[]: Re: Bootleg Medicom figures?             Quote Post by Freeshinji » Wed Feb 24, 2016 1:09 am sorry for the late bump but I can confirm your figure is real. I just received my Asuka 2.0 RAH Medicom and can also triple confirm because I also have the Rei 2.0 and Shinji 2.0 from RAH Medicom. They all are squared tape seal just like yours and with the Gainax sticker

[]: Re: Bootleg Medicom figures?             Quote Post by erik352 » Wed Mar 02, 2016 9:47 am Nice! thanks for the clarification!

I notice the box uses regular tape, not the circle tape. Also the flap uses velcro instead of magnets. Do you think this is a bootleg? Also, the hologram sticker is GAINAX, all the other RAH I got have 2 sticker, one is EVANGELION OFFICIALLY LICENSE, and the other is CLEVER CREATION COMPANY [URL=http://s331.photobucket.com/user/erik352/media/DSCN2967_zpsyymovkun.jpg.html] [/URL] [URL=http://s331.photobucket.com/user/erik352/media/DSCN2968_zpsafmxvi7j.jpg.html] [/URL] I bought several other RAH and they all have the magnet flap and circle tape on the box [URL=http://s331.photobucket.com/user/erik352/media/DSCN2969_zpsvqf2inzy.jpg.html] [/URL] Any help or info would be apprecated. thanks
